message.content: I'll create all 24 files for your restaurant management application. Let me start with the root configuration files and work through them systematically.

function.name: str_replace_editor
function.arguments:
{"command":"create","path":"/workspace/package.json","file_text":"{
  "name": "restaurant-management",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev",
    "build": "next build",
    "start": "next start",
    "lint": "next lint",
    "db:push": "prisma db push",
    "db:studio": "prisma studio"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "next": "^14.0.0",
    "react": "^18.0.0",
    "react-dom": "^18.0.0",
    "typescript": "^5.0.0",
    "next-auth": "^4.24.0",
    "prisma": "^5.0.0",
    "@prisma/client": "^5.0.0",
    "bcryptjs": "^2.4.3",
    "zod": "^3.22.0",
    "next-auth/prisma-adapter": "^1.0.7"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/node": "^20.0.0",
    "@types/react": "^18.0.0",
    "@types/react-dom": "^18.0.0",
    "@types/bcryptjs": "^2.4.0",
    "eslint": "^8.0.0",
    "eslint-config-next": "^14.0.0"
  }
}"}
